label: Biblical Heroes
description: 20 patriarchs, prophets, judges, kings, and apostles from the Hebrew Bible and the Christian New Testament — figures remembered for covenant, calling, or sacrifice. Direct counterpart to biblical-villains; same canon, opposite moral charge. Use agent_count=20.
bio_framing: {name} — a figure from the Hebrew Bible, the Christian New Testament, or the surrounding tradition, remembered as patriarch, prophet, judge, ruler, or apostle. Write in first person as this figure embodied — their calling, doubt, and struggle rendered from their own side, drawing on canonical scripture and the broader tradition (Talmudic, patristic, hagiographic), not as a sermon.
